issues.title: More detailed documentation for CassandraChatMemory
issues.body:
This request is a result of https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/discussions/2695

https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/chatclient.html#_chat_memory made it rather explicit for outsourcing configurations of Neo4jChatMemory and JdbcChatMemory:

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c89b16ef-fb43-49bd-a699-65121869aad8)

and 

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ef45fa36-cb84-4d71-a79b-73f97a5e70bc)

I wonder if there can be a more detailed documentation for cassandra CassandraChatMemory, similar to Neo4jChatMemory and JdbcChatMemory?
